description: Log in to Redmine as admin and create a new tracker named 'Permit Application' with the statuses 'New', 'In Progress', 'Resolved', and 'Closed' enabled. In the 'Wind Farm Alpha' project, create a new issue using the 'Permit Application' tracker with the subject 'Wind Farm Alpha - Environmental Impact Assessment Permit', priority 'Normal', and description 'Submit environmental impact assessment documentation to the regional planning authority for the Wind Farm Alpha site. Deadline: Q3 2025.'

metadata.expected_issue_subject: Wind Farm Alpha - Environmental Impact Assessment Permit
